lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Hello, welcome to the Cooking Guild. Only accomplished chefs and cooks are allowed in here. Feel free to use any of our facilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice cape, you're wearing!

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Thank you! It's my most prized possession, it's a Skillcape of Cooking; it shows that I've achieved level 99 Cooking and am one of the best chefs in the land!

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: If you ever achieve level 99 cooking you'll get to wear one too and doing so means you'll never burn any food!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, bye.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Hello, welcome to the Cooking Guild. It's always great to have such an accomplished chef visit us. Say, would you be interested in a Skillcape of Cooking? They're only available to master chefs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Okay, come back to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Cooking from you?

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Most certainly, by wearing this cape you'll never burn any food, I will have to ask for 99000 gold coins for such a privilege.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's much too expensive.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: I'm sorry you feel that way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Now you can use the title Master Chef.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Cooking from you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

sections.title: Trying to open the door without a chef's hat, a skillcape of Cooking, or Varrock Armour 3+

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: You can't come in here unless you're wearing a chef's hat, or something like that.

sections.title: Trying to open the door with below 32 Cooking and without a chef's hat

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Sorry. Only the finest chefs are allowed in here. Get your cooking level up to 32 and come back wearing a chef's hat.

sections.title: Trying to open the door with below 32 Cooking with a chef's hat

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: Sorry. Only the finest chefs are allowed in here. Get your cooking level up to 32.

lines.speaker: Head chef
lines.text: You have done well, [player name]!
